Why After Hours

Michael Schinzel and Kayne Zamorano didn't start in construction. They started with pool cleaning routes, getting up early, learning every backyard in the Valley, seeing firsthand what made a great pool and what made a frustrating one. That's how they met.

Over the last decade they went on to build luxury pools for custom home builders and high end clientele across the Phoenix Valley, learning the materials, the process, the craft. The kind of builds most people only see in magazines.

Why we built this model.

After years of building complex, high end pools we kept coming back to the same thought. More people deserve this. Not a watered down version of it. The real thing.

Most pool builders at this price point cut corners where you can't see them. They use materials you wouldn't choose if you knew what was available. They move fast and move on.

By curating our sizes, our materials, and our process, we're able to offer something the market hasn't seen at this price. Pools built with intention, finished with premium coping and tile, automated with the best equipment available, and delivered in 8 weeks.

What you get that you won't find anywhere else.

We source materials that simply aren't available through standard pool builders at this price point. Every finish, every tile selection, every piece of equipment is chosen because it's the best option, not the easiest one.

Premium coping and tile, standard. Full phone-controlled automation. LED lighting throughout. 8-week build, every time.

Our goal is simple.

Get more people in the water. Not with builds that leave you feeling like you compromised. With pools you're proud of. Pools your family actually lives in. Pools that make you think how did I get this much for this price.

Schedule Your Escape

The Pool You Deserve.
Without the Runaround.
